android.title: Android Capability Notes
android.body: This build ships the Android shell, LAN auto-discovery, basic pairing, and diagnostics export. QR pairing, the real upload queue, foreground reconnection, and incremental sync have not yet been ported to the Android native engine.

photoPermission.title: Photo Access Is Off
photoPermission.body: Allow access to Photos to keep auto-sync running.

rows.diagnosticsDesc: Export logs and device status for troubleshooting

actions.switchDeviceDesc: Disconnect current device and connect to another computer

exportUnavailable.title: Cannot Export
exportUnavailable.body: This build does not support exporting the diagnostics bundle.

exportFailed.title: Export Failed
exportFailed.body: Failed to export the diagnostics bundle. Please try again later.

languageSaveFailed.title: Cannot Change Language
languageSaveFailed.body: Failed to save the language setting. Please try again later.

global.editDeviceDesc: This name will be shown for this device in the sync history.
global.errorDeviceNameSave: Failed to save, please try again later
